description: Clear single-domain problem with known or easily discoverable answer
indicators: Direct question; single technology or domain; no stated unknowns; user confident in scope

description: Problem with some unknowns that needs formal reasoning
indicators: Cross-domain elements; multiple valid approaches; 1-2 unknowns; user unsure about scope or constraints

description: High-stakes or cross-domain problem with many unknowns
indicators: Regulatory or security-critical; novel domain; 3+ unknowns; significant consequences of getting it wrong

description: Design a reusable framework, template, tool, system, or contract surface
indicators: Creating something new; template or tool design; API or platform design; system architecture; workflow or operator contract standardization; cross-repo convergence

description: Run a cycle within an existing framework or process
indicators: Sprint execution; deployment; migration; code review; running an established workflow; implementing an approved cross-system migration or convergence slice
